message:
Add tab thumbnails in sidebar with disclosure groups

Toggle via View > Show Tabs in Sidebar (Cmd+Opt+T). When enabled,
each workspace in the sidebar gets a disclosure chevron exposing
live-updating tab thumbnail previews (reusing the same capture
mechanism as the thumbnail panel). The right-side thumbnail panel
and its toolbar toggle hide when sidebar tabs are active.

Also switches from WindowGroup to Window (single-instance) so
closing the window hides it and dock-click brings it back.
